title: 皐月賞の後に・ただ燃え尽きて……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan runs until every last bit of her
strength is used up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She lets out a sigh, relieved to see that all of her
hard work hasn't been in vain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After praising her, Ines Fujin suggests that they
race against each other again at the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, though feeling the urge to start preparing
for the next race, finds herself basking in the
glory of her Satsuki Sho victory.
